from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about a building into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Templates for predicates that can be integrated into a flowing sentence
    building_templates = {
        "architecturalStyle": "with architectural style {obj}",
        "buildingStartDate": "construction began in {obj}",
        "completionDate": "completed in {obj}",
        "floorCount": "{obj} floors",
        "location": "located at {obj}",
        "cost": "costing {obj}",
        "floorArea": "with floor area of {obj}",
        "architect": "designed by {obj}",
        "owner": "owned by {obj}",
        "formerName": "formerly known as {obj}",
        "height": "standing {obj} tall",
        "buildingType": "a {obj}",
        "developer": "developed by {obj}",
        "tenant": "tenanted by {obj}",
        "isPartOf": "part of {obj}",
        "country": "in {obj}",
        "currentTenants": "housing {obj}",
        "address": "at address {obj}",
        "inaugurationDate": "inaugurated on {obj}",
        "birthPlace": "born in {obj}",
        "deathPlace": "died in {obj}",
        "bedCount": "{obj} beds",
        "region": "in {obj} region",
        "state": "in {obj} state",
        "website": "website {obj}",
        "yearOfConstruction": "built in {obj}",
        "NationalRegisterOfHistoricPlacesReferenceNumber": "NRHP reference {obj}",
        "addedToTheNationalRegisterOfHistoricPlaces": "added to National Register on {obj}",
        "significantBuilding": "known for significant building {obj}",
        "governingBody": "governed by {obj}",
        "leader": "led by {obj}",
        "chancellor": "chancellor {obj}",
        "governmentType": "government type {obj}",
        "capital": "capital {obj}",
        "language": "language {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": "leader title {obj}",
        "currency": "currency {obj}",
        "ethnicGroup": "ethnic group {obj}",
        "origin": "originates from {obj}",
        "significantProject": "known for project {obj}",
        "foundationPlace": "founded in {obj}",
        "demonym": "demonym {obj}",
        "numberOfRooms": "{obj} rooms",
        "keyPerson": "key person {obj}",
        "architecture": "architecture {obj}",
        "postalCode": "postal code {obj}",
    }

    # Get main subject from first triple
    main_subject = triples[0].subject
    subject_triples = [t for t in triples if t.subject == main_subject]

    # Separate different types of information
    building_info = []
    location_info = []
    related_info = []

    for t in subject_triples:
        if t.predicate in building_templates:
            tmpl = building_templates[t.predicate]
            info = tmpl.format(obj=t.object)

            # Categorize by type for better sentence structure
            if t.predicate in ["country", "region", "state", "isPartOf", "location", "address"]:
                location_info.append(info)
            else:
                building_info.append(info)
        else:
            # Generic fallback
            related_info.append(f"{t.predicate.replace('_', ' ')} {t.object}")

    # Build the main sentence structure
    parts = [main_subject]

    # Add building type first if available
    type_info = None
    for t in subject_triples:
        if t.predicate == "buildingType":
            type_info = f"a {t.object}"
            break

    if type_info:
        parts.append(type_info)

    # Add building details as relative clauses
    if building_info:
        details = []
        for info in building_info[:5]:  # Limit to avoid overly long sentences
            details.append(info)
        if details:
            parts.append(f", {', '.join(details)}")

    # Add location information
    if location_info:
        loc_text = f", {', '.join(location_info)}"
        parts.append(loc_text)

    # Add related entity information with relative clauses
    related_subjects = set(t.subject for t in triples if t.subject != main_subject)
    if related_subjects:
        for subj in related_subjects:
            subj_triples = [t for t in triples if t.subject == subj]
            for t in subj_triples:
                if t.predicate in building_templates:
                    tmpl = building_templates[t.predicate]
                    info = tmpl.format(obj=t.object)
                    parts.append(f", which is {info}")

    # Construct final sentence
    sentence = " ".join(parts)

    # Clean up and format
    sentence = sentence.strip()
    sentence = sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:] if sentence else sentence

    if not sentence.endswith('.'):
        sentence += '.'

    # Clean up double spaces and commas
    import re
    sentence = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', sentence)
    sentence = re.sub(r',\s*,', ',', sentence)
    sentence = re.sub(r'\s+,', ', ', sentence)

    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
